name: Pickled Red Onions
recipeIngredient: 1 small red onion, peeled and sliced (1/8-inch thick)
recipeInstructions:
1. Blanch the onion slices in boiling salted water for 45 seconds.
2. Drain and place the onion slices in a medium-sized bowl.
3. Coarsely grind the peppercorns and cumin in a mortar or spice grinder.
4. Add the ground spices to the onions.
5. Add the remaining ingredients (including enough water to barely cover) to the bowl with the onions.
6. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
7. Let stand for several hours until the onions turn bright pink.
8. Cover and refrigerate; the pickled onions will last several weeks.
